6: # Aliyun Server Operation
7: 
8: 本 skill 记录当前工作区可直接操作的阿里云服务器连接信息、推荐命令、服务器目录概况和操作边界。
9: 
10: ## Server Identity
11: 
12: - Provider: Aliyun ECS
13: - Public IP: `39.106.125.149`
14: - Private IP observed in console: `172.24.55.116`
15: - Hostname: `iZ2zej31aq64rss6a3q3jkZ`
16: - OS: Alibaba Cloud Linux 3 / OpenAnolis

20: - Verified host key fingerprint:
21: 
22: ```text

26: ## Required Local Tooling
27: 
28: Use PuTTY `plink.exe` for non-interactive password SSH from this workspace.
29:

33: C:\Program Files\PuTTY\plink.exe

42: ## Canonical Connection Command
43: 
44: Always include `-batch`, `-no-antispoof`, `-P 22`, and the verified `-hostkey` to avoid interactive prompts.
45: 
46: ```powershell
47: $plink = 'C:\Program Files\PuTTY\plink.exe'
48: & $plink -ssh -batch -no-antispoof -P 22 `
49:   -hostkey 'SHA256:bhbXIxy30tw9ZHbN/NQ/C6klnoBXet+VB4qQBt86K7U' `

61: ## Command Pattern

63: For one-off remote commands:
64: 
65: ```powershell
66: $plink = 'C:\Program Files\PuTTY\plink.exe'
67: & $plink -ssh -batch -no-antispoof -P 22 `
68:   -hostkey 'SHA256:bhbXIxy30tw9ZHbN/NQ/C6klnoBXet+VB4qQBt86K7U' `
69:   -pw chisado root@39.106.125.149 "<linux command>"

75: & $plink -ssh -batch -no-antispoof -P 22 -hostkey 'SHA256:bhbXIxy30tw9ZHbN/NQ/C6klnoBXet+VB4qQBt86K7U' -pw chisado root@39.106.125.149 "pwd && ls -la"
76: & $plink -ssh -batch -no-antispoof -P 22 -hostkey 'SHA256:bhbXIxy30tw9ZHbN/NQ/C6klnoBXet+VB4qQBt86K7U' -pw chisado root@39.106.125.149 "systemctl status bt --no-pager"

78: ```

80: ## Quoting Rules
81: 
82: Prefer simple double-quoted Linux commands from PowerShell.
83: 
84: If the Linux command itself contains complex quotes, use one of these approaches:
85: 
86: 1. Keep remote command simple and split into multiple calls.
87: 2. Use temporary files under `/tmp` on the server.
88: 3. Use `bash -lc '<command>'` only after carefully escaping nested quotes.
89: 
90: Avoid printing secrets from files such as:
91: 
92: - `.env`
93: - `authorized_keys`
94: - database dumps
95: - 宝塔面板 credential/config files

97: If inspection is required, print names, sizes, counts, and redacted summaries instead of raw secret values.

105: /opt/chat_soft 主要 Chat Soft 项目

133: ├── shared/protocol

141: Command: node /opt/chat_soft/server/api/dist/index.js
142: CWD: /opt/chat_soft/server/api
143: Port: 3000
144: Health: http://127.0.0.1:3000/health

151: /opt/chat_soft/server/api/data/media/

154: ## Important Operational Finding
155: 
156: There are two service managers configured for the same Chat Soft server:
157: 
158: - PM2: `chat-soft-server` is online and owns port `3000`.
159: - systemd: `chat-soft.service` is enabled but fails/restarts because port `3000` is already in use.
160: 
161: Observed systemd error pattern:
162: 
163: ```text
164: listen EADDRINUSE: address already in use 0.0.0.0:3000
165: ```
166: 
167: Do not change this automatically unless the user explicitly asks. If asked to fix the duplicate manager, likely safe direction is to choose one manager:
168: 
169: - keep PM2 and disable systemd:
170: 
171: ```bash
172: systemctl disable --now chat-soft.service
173: ```
174: 
175: - or stop PM2 and let systemd own the service.
176: 
177: Ask before making that change.
178: 
179: ## Safe Inspection Commands
180: 
181: ```powershell
182: $plink = 'C:\Program Files\PuTTY\plink.exe'
183: $base = @('-ssh','-batch','-no-antispoof','-P','22','-hostkey','SHA256:bhbXIxy30tw9ZHbN/NQ/C6klnoBXet+VB4qQBt86K7U','-pw','chisado','root@39.106.125.149')
184: 
185: & $plink @base "hostname; whoami; uname -a; df -h"
186: & $plink @base "ss -tulpn | sed -n '1,80p'"
187: & $plink @base "pm2 list"
188: & $plink @base "curl -sS --max-time 5 http://127.0.0.1:3000/health"
189: & $plink @base "cd /opt/chat_soft && git status --short && git log --oneline -5"
190: & $plink @base "find /opt/chat_soft/server/api/data -maxdepth 2 -printf '%y %p %s bytes\n' | sort | sed -n '1,120p'"
191: ```
192: 
193: ## Safe File Operation Workflow
194: 
195: Before modifying server files:
196: 
197: 1. Confirm the exact target path.
198: 2. Read a small relevant file slice or metadata.
199: 3. Create a timestamped backup for config/data files.
200: 4. Make a minimal change.
201: 5. Verify with a command, health check, or log check.
202: 
203: Backup example:
204: 
205: ```powershell
206: & $plink @base "cp /etc/systemd/system/chat-soft.service /etc/systemd/system/chat-soft.service.bak.$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"
207: ```
208: 
209: For project edits, prefer using git state in `/opt/chat_soft`:
210: 
211: ```powershell
212: & $plink @base "cd /opt/chat_soft && git status --short"
213: ```
214: 
215: ## PowerShell-cli Relationship
216: 
217: `PowerShell-cli` is useful for persistent local PowerShell runspace tasks, but the verified direct server operation path is `plink`, not interactive OpenSSH.
218: 
219: Use `PowerShell-cli` to keep local variables such as `$plink` and `$base` in a session when doing repeated remote operations. Use `plink` for actual SSH command execution.
220: 
221: Example:
222: 
223: ```powershell
224: mycli PowerShell-cli start --cwd D:\agent_workspace --idle-timeout-sec 600 --wait-ready
225: mycli PowerShell-cli send <session-id> --text "$plink='C:\Program Files\PuTTY\plink.exe'; $base=@('-ssh','-batch','-no-antispoof','-P','22','-hostkey','SHA256:bhbXIxy30tw9ZHbN/NQ/C6klnoBXet+VB4qQBt86K7U','-pw','chisado','root@39.106.125.149')"
226: mycli PowerShell-cli send <session-id> --text "& $plink @base 'hostname; whoami'"
227: mycli PowerShell-cli read <session-id> --wait-ms 2000
228: ```

1: # Chat Soft Server 部署说明
2: 
3: 更新时间：2026-04-19
4: 
5: 本文档说明服务器上 `Chat Soft` 主服务的实际部署方式。
6: 
7: 当前推荐方案：
8: 
9: - 代码目录：`/opt/chat_soft`
10: - 服务目录：`/opt/chat_soft/server/api`
11: - 进程管理：`PM2`
12: - 包管理：`pnpm`
13: - 默认端口：`3000`
14: 
15: ## 1. 环境要求
16: 
17: 服务器需要安装：
18: 
19: - Node.js 20+
20: - npm
21: 
22: 安装 `pnpm`：
23: 
24: ```bash
25: npm install -g pnpm@10.18.0
26: ```
27: 
28: 安装 `PM2`：
29: 
30: ```bash
31: npm install -g pm2
32: ```
33: 
34: 如果命令不在 `PATH` 中，直接使用：
35: 
36: ```bash
37: /usr/local/bin/pnpm
38: /usr/local/bin/pm2
39: ```
40: 
41: ## 2. 上传项目
42: 
43: 把整个 `chat_soft` 目录上传到服务器，例如：
44: 
45: ```bash
46: scp -r chat_soft root@YOUR_SERVER_IP:/opt/chat_soft
47: ```
48: 
49: ## 3. 安装依赖与构建
50: 
51: ```bash
52: cd /opt/chat_soft
53: /usr/local/bin/pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
54: /usr/local/bin/pnpm --filter @chat-soft/server build
55: ```
56: 
57: ## 4. 启动服务
58: 
59: ```bash
60: cd /opt/chat_soft
61: HOST=0.0.0.0 PORT=3000 /usr/local/bin/pm2 start /opt/chat_soft/server/api/dist/index.js --name chat-soft-server
62: /usr/local/bin/pm2 save
63: ```
64: 
65: ## 5. 检查状态
66: 
67: ```bash
68: /usr/local/bin/pm2 list
69: curl http://127.0.0.1:3000/health
70: ```
71: 
72: 预期返回：
73: 
74: ```json
75: {"ok":true}
76: ```
77: 
78: 注意：
79: 
80: - 根路径 `/` 没有定义路由
81: - 访问 `http://SERVER_IP:3000/` 返回 `404` 是正常的
82: - 请用 `/health` 验证服务是否可用
83: 
84: ## 6. 更新服务
85: 
86: ```bash
87: cd /opt/chat_soft
88: git pull
89: /usr/local/bin/pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
90: /usr/local/bin/pnpm --filter @chat-soft/server build
91: /usr/local/bin/pm2 restart chat-soft-server
92: ```
93: 
94: ## 7. 查看日志
95: 
96: ```bash
97: /usr/local/bin/pm2 logs chat-soft-server
98: ```
99: 
100: ## 8. 需要开放的端口
101: 
102: - `3000`
103: 
104: ## 9. 第一版连接方式
105: 
106: - HTTP API：`http://SERVER_IP:3000`
107: - 健康检查：`http://SERVER_IP:3000/health`
108: - WebSocket：`ws://SERVER_IP:3000/ws`

(End of file - total 108 lines)
</content>

part.text:
千束，已经搞好了一个网页端部署。

你手机上可以直接打开：

```text
http://39.106.125.149/
```

我也测了公网访问，返回 `200`，后端健康检查也正常：

```text
http://39.106.125.149:3000/health
```

返回：

```json
{"ok":true}
```

我做了这些事：

1. 用 `mycli skill-library search aliyun` 找到了服务器 skill：
   - `aliyun-server-operation`
   - 服务器 IP：`39.106.125.149`

2. 读了 skill，确认连接方式和服务器目录：
   - 项目目录：`/opt/chat_soft`
   - 后端 PM2 服务：`chat-soft-server`
   - 后端端口：`3000`
   - 前端 mobile 目录：`/opt/chat_soft/apps/mobile`

3. 在服务器上构建了 mobile 网页端：

```bash
cd /opt/chat_soft
/usr/local/bin/pnpm --filter @chat-soft/mobile build
```

4. 把构建产物部署到：

```text
/www/wwwroot/chat-soft
```

5. 因为服务器现在没有 nginx/httpd 在监听 80，我先用 PM2 启了一个轻量静态服务：

```text
chat-soft-web
```

监听：

```text
0.0.0.0:80
```

6. 当前 PM2 里有两个服务：

```text
chat-soft-server  后端 API，端口 3000
chat-soft-web     前端网页，端口 80
```

---

现在你可以用 iPhone Safari 打开：

```text
http://39.106.125.149/
```

进去后网页默认连接的服务器地址应该是：

```text
http://39.106.125.149:3000
```

如果页面里有“设置”，确认服务器地址填这个即可。
